hero.title: Services
hero.subtitle: Experience top-tier cleaning solutions tailored to your needs, delivered right to your doorstep with unmatched convenience and quality.

mainCta.title: Your Quality Service Awaits
mainCta.subtitle: Join countless satisfied customers and enjoy a cleaner, healthier quality service.

carCleaning.title: Car Cleaning
carCleaning.description: Our car cleaning services offer a thorough interior vacuum, dashboard polish, window cleaning, and exterior wash, ensuring your vehicle looks pristine inside and out.

trashBin.title: Trash Bin Cleaning
trashBin.description: Professional sanitization service that eliminates odors, bacteria, and germs with eco-friendly solutions.

items.title: Advanced Cleaning Equipment
items.description: Our providers use state-of-the-art equipment to ensure efficient and effective cleaning for every service offered.

items.title: Thorough Background Checks
items.description: All providers undergo comprehensive background checks to guarantee safety and reliability for our customers.

items.title: Flexible Scheduling
items.description: Book services at your convenience, with options for immediate or future scheduling to fit your busy lifestyle.

sectionServices.subtitle: Prices for wash packages depend on your vehicle type. Vehicle types like MVP and Truck include an additional $10 each. Displayed prices are for passenger cars only.
sectionServices.customText: Contact us for personalized cleaning solutions tailored to your specific needs.
sectionServices.providerSubtitle: Sign up as a service provider
sectionServices.userTitle: Fast, reliable services at your doorstep, at your fingertips
